message:
refactor: migrate output facade to parking_lot::RwLock

Eliminates lock poisoning risk and simplifies code by removing
.expect("poisoned") calls from the global output singleton.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ categories = ["command-line-interface", "development-tools"]
 [dependencies]
 # Core terminal detection (always needed)
 crossterm = "0.28"
+parking_lot = "0.12"
 regex = "1"
 unicode-width = "0.2"
